examples.title: Example: *Course 3 (Newtonian Mechanics)** will answer **why objects move** by introducing forces, Newton's laws, free-body diagrams, friction, tension, and equilibrium.
examples.content: A practical example demonstrating *Course 3 (Newtonian Mechanics)** will answer **why objects move** by introducing forces, Newton's laws, free-body diagrams, friction, tension, and equilibrium.
